smb.server.title: Server Name or Host
smb.server.description:
Defines the Server Name.
Format for Windows & Linux : hostname (file.core.net) OR IP Address (192.168.1.1)

smb.username.title: User Name
smb.username.description:
Defines the username to connect to the file share. Enter the username in the order as defined below for Windows & Linux.
Format must contain a domain name or computer name regardless Windows or Linux, like: domainname\username OR computername\username OR .\username.

smb.password.title: Password
smb.password.description: Defines the Password to connect to the file share.

smb.storePath.title: Target Path
smb.storePath.description:
Defines the SMB Target Path.
Format ShareName\Path
